# Code of Conduct

## Our Standards

We are committed to providing a welcoming and professional environment.

Examples of positive behavior:

* Respectful communication
* Constructive feedback
* Collaborative problem solving
* Helping new contributors

Examples of unacceptable behavior:

* Harassment
* Personal attacks
* Discrimination
* Threats
* Spam or disruptive conduct

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may remove comments, issues, pull requests, or contributions that violate this Code of Conduct.

Repeated violations may result in temporary or permanent bans.

## Scope

This Code of Conduct applies to:

* GitHub Issues
* Pull Requests
* Discussions
* Community channels

## Reporting

Report violations privately to the project maintainers.
